source.name: Level 6: 1.3 Test Your Knowledge - MCP url path
source.instructions: **For the FastMCP banking server in this repo (`mcp_server/banking.py`), which statement about `mcp_servers` → `url` in `endpoints.yml` is correct?**

answers.answer: It should be only `http://127.0.0.1:8080` with no path
It must include the Streamable HTTP path, e.g. `http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp`, matching where the server listens

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT set mcp_servers url for Streamable HTTP
source.guidance: Register the MCP server in the main `endpoints.yml`. The sample server exposes Streamable HTTP at `/mcp` on port 8080.
